mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('forest_scrap_seq')
INSERT INTO forest_scrap (id, user_id, forest_knot_id, memo, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{forestKnotId}, #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forest_scrap WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND forest_knot_id = #{forestKnotId}
mapper.update: UPDATE forest_scrap SET memo = #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT forest_knot_id FROM forest_scrap WHERE user_id = #{userId}
